description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a tan skeletonized thumbhole stock, providing both reduced weight and ergonomic handling. The main body and barrel are finished in matte black, with a prominent scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is long and cylindrical, ending with an integrally suppressed muzzle device for reduced firing noise. The overall construction appears to be a combination of metal and polymer, with the stock likely made from a lightweight composite. The rifle's design suggests it is intended for precision shooting in urban environments, offering both stability and stealth.
description: A modern rifle with a tan skeletonized thumbhole stock, matte black body, scope, and integrally suppressed barrel. Features a detachable box magazine and is built for precision and stealth.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan skeletonized thumbhole stock, black body, mounted scope, detachable box magazine, and integrally suppressed barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle of the suppressed barrel and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tan skeletonized stock, black receiver, scope, and magazine, with more detail on the magazine's position.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the thumbhole stock's opening and the scope's eyepiece, with the barrel extending away.
